General.Name: Xingda International Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Xingda International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and trades in radial tire cords, bead wires, and other wires in the People's Republic of China, India, the United States, Thailand, Romania, Slovakia, Brazil, and internationally. It also offers galvanized wires/wire ropes, steel cords, hose wires, etc. In addition, the company invests in commercial properties; and produces and supplies heating power. It serves tire and hose manufacturers. Xingda International Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.
